ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( AND(ISCHANGED(StageName),ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName),'Closed Lost')), AND(ISCHANGED(StageName) = FALSE,TEXT(StageName)='Closed Lost') ), OR(BEGINS(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, 'NATT_Units'), BEGINS(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, 'NATT_BluEdge')), TEXT($User.UserType) <> 'Standard')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Opportunity is Closed Lost, If you need to edit it, contact your admin.
